Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Exports the contents of a grid (using the selected order and filters) to an Excel file. LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'OpenDocument'
&CellRow = 1 &FirstColumn = 1
Do 'LoadGridState'
Do 'WriteFilters'
Do 'WriteColumnTitles'
Do 'WriteData'
Do 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Sub 'OpenDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = !"ExportwwNotas-" + &Random.ToString().Trim() + !".xlsx"
&ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteFilters'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not (&NfeNum.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "NºNF") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeNum EndIf
If not (&NfePedCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Pedido") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfePedCod EndIf
If not (&NfeCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Seq.") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeCod EndIf
If not (&NfeProTer.IsEmpty()) If Not &NfeProTer.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = &NfeProTer.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf
If not (&ModCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Modelo Documentos") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&ModCod) EndIf
If not (&FilCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "F.") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &FilCod EndIf
If not (&NfeDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &NfeDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Em.") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &NfeDtaEms WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, false, &CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2, " - ") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &NfeDtaEms_To EndIf
If not (&NfeSts.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Sts") If Not &NfeSts.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &NfeSts.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliRaz1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cli/For." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliRaz1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cli/For." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeCliCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeEntSai1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Saída /Entrada" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &NfeEntSai1.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &NfeEntSai1.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCnpj1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliCnpj1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeVlrTot1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Valor NFe" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeVlrTot1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeLctCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Lancamento" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeLctCod1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCidUF1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Estado/UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliCidUF1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeRctPen1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Receituário" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &NfeRctPen1.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &NfeRctPen1.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliRaz2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cli/For." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliRaz2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cli/For." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeCliCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeEntSai2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Saída /Entrada" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &NfeEntSai2.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &NfeEntSai2.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCnpj2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliCnpj2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeVlrTot2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Valor NFe" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeVlrTot2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeLctCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Lancamento" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeLctCod2 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCidUF2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Estado/UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliCidUF2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeRctPen2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Receituário" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &NfeRctPen2.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &NfeRctPen2.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliRaz3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cli/For." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliRaz3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cli/For." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeCliCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeEntSai3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Saída /Entrada" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &NfeEntSai3.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &NfeEntSai3.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCnpj3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliCnpj3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeVlrTot3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Valor NFe" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeVlrTot3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeLctCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Lancamento" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeLctCod3 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCidUF3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Estado/UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliCidUF3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeRctPen3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Receituário" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &NfeRctPen3.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &NfeRctPen3.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 4 &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(4) &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliRaz4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Cli/For." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliRaz4) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCod4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Cli/For." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeCliCod4 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeEntSai4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Saída /Entrada" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &NfeEntSai4.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &NfeEntSai4.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCnpj4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CPF/CNPJ" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliCnpj4) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeVlrTot4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Valor NFe" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeVlrTot4 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeLctCod4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Lancamento" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &NfeLctCod4 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCidUF4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Estado/UF" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&NfeCliCidUF4) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeRctPen4.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Receituário" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &NfeRctPen4.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &NfeRctPen4.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf EndIf &CellRow += 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteColumnTitles'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&VisibleColumnCount = 0 If &Session.Get(!'wwNotasColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwNotasColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf
For &ColumnsSelector_Column in &ColumnsSelector.Columns If &ColumnsSelector_Column.IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = GetMessageText(iif(&ColumnsSelector_Column.DisplayName.IsEmpty(), &ColumnsSelector_Column.ColumnName, &ColumnsSelector_Column.DisplayName)) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Color = 11 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
For each order EmpCod FilCod (NfeNum) when &OrderedBy = 1 order NfeNum when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (NfeNum) when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = True order NfeDtaEms when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (NfeDtaEms) when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = True order NfeVlrTot when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (NfeVlrTot) when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = True order NfeCliCidUF when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (NfeCliCidUF) when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = True
using DSwwNotas(&NfeNum, &NfePedCod, &NfeCod, &NfeProTer, &ModCod, &FilCod , &NfeDtaEms, &NfeDtaEms_To, &NfeSts, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &NfeCliRaz1, &NfeCliCod1 , &NfeEntSai1, &NfeCliCnpj1, &NfeVlrTot1, &NfeLctCod1, &NfeCliCidUF1, &NfeRctPen1 , &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &NfeCliRaz2, &NfeCliCod2, &NfeEntSai2, &NfeCliCnpj2 , &NfeVlrTot2, &NfeLctCod2, &NfeCliCidUF2, &NfeRctPen2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3 , &NfeCliRaz3, &NfeCliCod3, &NfeEntSai3, &NfeCliCnpj3, &NfeVlrTot3, &NfeLctCod3 , &NfeCliCidUF3, &NfeRctPen3, &DynamicFiltersEnabled4, &DynamicFiltersSelector4, &NfeCliRaz4, &NfeCliCod4 , &NfeEntSai4, &NfeCliCnpj4, &NfeVlrTot4, &NfeLctCod4, &NfeCliCidUF4, &NfeRctPen4)
// Write cell values &CellRow += 1
Do 'BeforeWriteLine' &VisibleColumnCount = 0 If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = FilCod &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = NfeCod &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = NfeNum &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = NfePedCod &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Date = NfeDtaEms &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible = True if NfeCliRaz.Length() > 40 &gridNfeCliRaz = substr(upper(NfeCliCodRaz),1,45) + '...' Else &gridNfeCliRaz = NfeCliCodRaz EndIF &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&GridNfeCliRaz) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = NfeVlrTot &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = NfeSts.EnumerationDescription() &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = NfeEntSai.EnumerationDescription() &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible = True
&gridNfeLctNom = trim(str(NfeLctCod)) + '-'+ Substr(NfeLctNom, 1, 15) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&gridNfeLctNom) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(NfeChv) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(NfeCliCidUF) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(NfeDadAdi) &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
Do 'AfterWriteLine'
Endfor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CheckStatus'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &Filename = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"FilCod", '', !'Filial', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeCod", '', !'Seq.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeNum", '', !'Nº NF', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfePedCod", '', !'Pedido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&GridNfeCliRaz", '', !'Razão/Nome', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeVlrTot", '', !'Valor NF', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeSts", '', !'Status', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeEntSai", '', !'Tipo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridNfeLctNom", '', !'Tipo Lcto.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeChv", '', !'Chave NFE', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeCliCidUF", '', !'UF', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeDadAdi", '', !'Adicionais', False, '')
&UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwNotasColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(!"wwNotasGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wwNotasGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wwNotasGridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFENUM" &NfeNum.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEPEDCOD" &NfePedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFECOD" &NfeCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEPROTER" &NfeProTer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MODCOD" &ModCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEDTAEMS" &NfeDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &NfeDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFESTS" &NfeSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
